spec_match.rationale: Directly tests the boundary conditions of the opaque origin specification change, including direct messaging, named channels, storage domains, transferables, and fallback Blob URLs.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional interactivity. Includes single test triggers, a global test batch executor, a live percentage/count summary dashboard, and detailed console-style output logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the index blurb perfectly, introducing the targeted six communication tests.

edge_cases.rationale: Intelligently processes expected SecurityErrors as successes for local storage tests and uses distinct timing triggers to prevent background message collisions.

references.rationale: The page does not cite the required external ChromeStatus entry link.

design_system.rationale: Employs showcase layout grids, clean flex titles, clear badge borders, and standard color tokens for state variables.

openQuestions.title: Cite the ChromeStatus entry link in references
openQuestions.detail: Add the required external reference link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6290352295247872 under the see also block to achieve complete showcase conformance.
